---
title: "Interactive Tables"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
library(DT)

library(tidyverse)


verbum_df <- readxl::read_xlsx("VERBUM.xlsx")

verbum_clean <- verbum_df |> 
  rename_with(~ tolower(str_replace_all(.x, " +", "_"))) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "n/a"))) |> 
  separate(primary_references, into = c("author", "title", "para")) |> 
  group_by(author, title, para) |> 
  mutate(local_id = row_number(), .after = para)

datatable(verbum_clean,
          extensions = c('Buttons', 'Scroller'),
          options = list(
            dom = 'Bfrtip',
            buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
            deferRender = TRUE,
            scrollY = 600,
            scroller = TRUE,
            pageLength = 50,
            initComplete = JS(
              "function(settings, json) {",
              "$(this.api().table().header()).css({'background-color': '#2c3e50', 'color': '#fff'});",
              "}")
          ),
          filter = list(position = 'top', clear = FALSE),
          rownames = FALSE,
          class = 'display compact nowrap') |>
  formatStyle(columns = c('gender', 'term'),
              backgroundColor = 'lightyellow') |>
  formatStyle('age_relative_definition',
              fontWeight = 'bold')
```
